description: Straight out of maxima's hot new collection, this analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With its minimal styling, this watch makes for a fabulous and fashionable daily wear for those who want a touch of flamboyance to their outfit. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort White dial with black lettering Logo at the 12-hour mark Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Leather strap with tang clasp for comfort and style Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain
